package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_bootstrap_per_file: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Tests that rebuild the full application bootstrap repeatedly instead of using shared test setup.
type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileModel
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileService struct {
    repo *CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFile(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileDTO) error {

    router := gin.Default()
    repo := &CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    svc := &CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileService{repo: repo, client: client}
    router.GET("/api/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
        var model CaseRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFileModel
        if err := svc.repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", c.Query("id")).First(&model).Error; err != nil {
            c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "not found"})
            return
        }
        c.JSON(http.StatusOK, model)
    })
    _ = router
    _ = svc
    return nil
}
